theScene: Wondering if you could freely roam around the Labyrinth like every other place you've gone through, you attempt to plot a venture into it using your Grimoire... But instead of a cleanly laid out array of features and highlights, you find that the pages show a mix of garbled or blank text, and try as you might, none of the options or settings seem to work right, either refusing to confirm or remaining stubbornly unselectable.

After some frustrating messing around and flipping through, however, you do eventually find a 'Labyrinth Exploration' quest... And with nothing else available, you tentatively accept it before proceeding onward.
Almost instantly, you find yourself back within the swirling, churning confines of the Umbral Labyrinth's darkened halls, in a chamber adorned with braziers filled with flickering green flames.

After a brief moment of the usual disorientation, you realize that you've materialized right in front of Ushris who is calmly sipping tea, just like how you find her whenever you visit the Labyrinth. Acknowledging your presence with a seemingly unsurprised glance, she daintily sets the porcelain cup down with her huge claws, letting out a lazy sigh before looking to you with a small smile.
Welcome back, [ThePlayerName]. Hihi,♪ interested in exploring the Labyrinth I presume?

Seeing no reason to beat around the bush, you answer with an affirmative nod, which the gothic hellhound responds to with a small, prim head tilt of her own before switching to a more sober tone to explain.

This place is sadly a bit... finicky. I shan't go into the fine details lest I talk your ear off, but suffice to say that with how much of a nexus of demonic energy this place is, magical navigational devices simply cannot get a handle on it, no matter how well designed they are...
She lets a disappointing pause hang for a moment, taking another dainty sip of tea, then turns back to you with a confident smile.

{i}Nevertheless{/i}... as you may remember, I am a witch of no small power, and I have studied this place for quite some time... So if you give me access to that Grimoire of yours, I can attune it to the Labyrinth so you may delve into its winding pathways without finding yourself faced with wrong directions and dead ends at every turn... or worse.

She lets out an ominous giggle which transitions into a slightly dramatic sigh as she lazily crosses her legs, the motion alluringly squishing her thighs together and making her stockings audibly rub against each other, the simple gesture and soft sound ending up surprisingly seductive, though Ushris herself carries on conversationally.
Frankly spoken, it is a rather complex procedure and a bit of a hassle for me...

... but on the other claw, having firsthand information from a certain resourceful, cute, and {i}delectable{/i} adventurer would doubtless be beneficial to my research... So in exchange for this rather special allowance, I would be grateful if you would report to me should your explorations turn up anything interesting.

As you ponder whether you should agree, you remember the tricks she pulled on you as you went through her level and start getting second thoughts about this 'deal', wondering if there isn't some sort of hidden clause or even a trap behind this agreement. Before you can voice your concerns, however, Ushris seems to guess at your suspicions based on your hesitation and expression, and titters amicably.

Oh, worry yourself not, dear [ThePlayerName]. This is very much a no-strings-attached affair. Of course, the more information you can gather, the better, but you will be under no obligation of any sort, and I swear I will not use this as an opportunity to entrap or addle you.
Elegantly, she rises the smallest of her huge claws, wiggling it playfully.

She giggles again, and seeing as you ultimately have no choice but to take her word for it and would gain nothing from hemming and hawing, you agree, prompting her to nod contently... though her expression then unexpectedly switches to a much more serious one as she raises a massive index finger in warning.

Given you have managed to clear the Labyrinth, I shall have trust in your abilities and make the preparations forthwith, but do be warned that the depths of the Umbral are not... normal. You may find yourself in places all across the continent, or assailed by dreamy apparitions devoid of actual substance, but confoundingly realistic...
Things may not always make sense while you're in there, and were you not a qualified adventurer, I would not allow you into such an area, for your own safety.

But I know that you're a smart, diligent, spirited good boy, and even should the worst come to pass, I can at least assure you that your recall stone will guarantee your safety.♪ No matter how seemingly dire things get, remember that everything is merely a nightmarish façade that the Labyrinth is showing you based on Lucidia's collective unconscious and your own memories.

...At least... that's how it {i}seems{/i} to work. Again, I won't give you a lecture, both for your sake and mine, as it is frankly a complex, tedious subject that you would doubtless find boring... Suffice to say that though the illusions you will face will be devoid of actual substance, they will very much {i}feel{/i} like the real thing, and should you yield to the ordeals you will face, there will likely be aftereffects on your psyche...
But nothing you shouldn't be used to. After all, I'm sure you've already had cause to visit that Church of yours many times, hm?
She again gives an amused laugh, then taps her hands together, like a schoolmistress announcing the end of recess.

Well, for the time being, dear [ThePlayerName], off you go back to Town. The next time you stop by, I will have everything set up for you and all you'll need to do is to query your Grimoire as normal. Hihihi.♪ Do your best.

Unsure of what you're getting yourself into, but reasonably confident that it's at least nothing you can't back out of if you feel like it, you turn back and leave the Labyrinth, letting Ushris go back to quietly enjoying her tea.
